title: anoectochilus hasseltii
intro: Anoectochilus hasseltii, also known as the Hasselt's orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Anoectochilus hasseltii has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anoectochilus hasseltii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Anoectochilus hasseltii is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be dried and powdered for later consumption.
